What is Off The Road 2?

The Ultimate Open-World Off-Road Experience

Off The Road 2 (OTR2) is the highly anticipated sequel to the massively popular Off The Road open-world driving game by OHO Games. Bigger maps, more vehicles, improved physics, and stunning graphics make this one of the best mobile driving games ever made.

Drive cars, trucks, and SUVs across rugged mountains, muddy forests, sandy deserts, and rocky cliffs. Hop in a plane and fly over the massive open world, or jump in a boat and explore rivers and oceans. The variety of vehicles and terrains makes every session feel completely different.

Why Download Off The Road 2 Mod APK?

The original game locks most content behind paywalls and hours of grinding. With our Mod APK, every vehicle, map, and feature is available from the moment you launch. Unlimited money, unlimited gems, VIP unlocked, zero ads — the complete experience without any frustration.

How to Install
1
Download the APK File
Tap the download button. File size is approximately 380 MB — ensure you have enough storage and a stable connection.
2
Enable Unknown Sources
Go to Settings → Security → Install Unknown Apps and toggle it ON for your browser or file manager.
3
Uninstall Previous Version
If you have the original Off The Road 2 installed, uninstall it first to avoid conflicts.
4
Install the APK
Open your downloads folder, tap the APK file, and tap Install. Takes less than a minute.
5
Launch and Enjoy!
Open the game — unlimited money, gems, VIP, all vehicles and maps unlocked. No ads. Enjoy!

Frequently Asked Questions
Is Off The Road 2 Mod APK safe to download? ▼
Yes, completely safe. Scanned with multiple antivirus tools. Tested on Android 10, 11, 12, 13, and 14 without issues.
Do I need to root my Android phone? ▼
No root required. Works perfectly on non-rooted Android phones. Just enable Unknown Sources and install.
Will my account get banned? ▼
Off The Road 2 is primarily single-player so ban risk is very low. We recommend using a secondary account to be safe.
Is this Off The Road 2 Mod APK free? ▼
Yes, 100% free. No payment, no subscription, no survey, no password. Just download and install.
Does it work on iOS? ▼
No, APK files only work on Android. iOS uses a different format. We only provide the Android version.
What Android version is required? ▼
Android 5.0 (Lollipop) or higher. Works on all Android phones and tablets including Android 13 and 14.
